2604.21523.title: Seeing Isn't Believing: Uncovering Blind Spots in Evaluator Vision-Language Models
2604.21523.paper_summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used to evaluate outputs of other models, for image-to-text (I2T) tasks such as visual question answering, and text-to-image (T2I) generation tasks. Despite this growing reliance, the reliability of these Evaluator VLMs remains under explored. In this work, we systematically evaluate the reliability of Evaluator VLMs across both I2T and T2I tasks. We introduce targeted perturbations that degrade output quality along key error dimensions, including object hallucinations, spatial reasoning, factual grounding, and visual fidelity. These perturbations test whether Evaluator VLMs can reliably account for these quality degrading errors in their evaluations. Using a comprehensive benchmark of over 4000 perturbed instances spanning 40 perturbation dimensions, we evaluate 4 prominent VLMs using single-answer scoring, pairwise comparison, and reference-guided paradigms. Our findings reveal that current VLM evaluators exhibit substantial blind spots: they often fail to detect perturbed outputs - in some cases exceeding 50%, struggle particularly with fine-grained compositional and spatial errors, and are often insensitive to hallucinated content that contradicts the input image. Pairwise comparison proves more reliable, though failure rates persist. These results highlight the unreliable nature of current Evaluator VLMs and urge caution in their deployment for benchmarking and development decisions. Code and data have been made publicly available.
2604.21523.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺-語言模型（VLMs）越來越多地用於評估其他模型的輸出，適用於圖像到文本（I2T）任務，如視覺問答，以及文本到圖像（T2I）生成任務。儘管對此日益增長的依賴，這些評估者 VLM 的可靠性仍然未被充分探討。在本研究中，我們系統地評估了評估者 VLM 在 I2T 和 T2I 任務中的可靠性。我們引入了針對性的擾動，這些擾動會沿著關鍵錯誤維度降低輸出質量，包括物體幻覺、空間推理、事實基礎和視覺真實性。這些擾動測試評估者 VLM 是否能可靠地考慮這些質量下降錯誤在其評估中的影響。使用超過 4000 個擾動實例的綜合基準，涵蓋 40 個擾動維度，我們使用單一答案評分、成對比較和參考引導範式評估了 4 個突出的 VLM。我們的發現揭示了當前 VLM 評估者存在顯著的盲點：它們經常無法檢測擾動輸出——在某些情況下超過 50%，特別是在細微的組合和空間錯誤方面掙扎，並且通常對與輸入圖像矛盾的幻覺內容不敏感。成對比較證明更可靠，儘管失敗率仍然存在。這些結果突顯了當前評估者 VLM 的不可靠性，並對其在基準測試和開發決策中的應用提出警告。代碼和數據已公開提供。
2604.21523.author: Mohammed Safi Ur Rahman Khan et.al.
2604.21523.authors: Mohammed Safi Ur Rahman Khan, Sanjay Suryanarayanan, Tushar Anand, Mitesh M. Khapra
